disclaimer.en: Very Hard mode features randomized floors and conditions with varying boss encounters. Floor and conditions are random (chosen between 3-4 sets for every player). Floors 5, 10, and 15 have fixed bosses: Demiurge Stella, Demiurge Drakhan, and Demiurge Vlada (positions randomized). Floor 20 can alternate between 2 sets of bosses.
disclaimer.jp: ベリーハードモードではフロアと条件がランダム化され、ボスの組み合わせが変わります。各プレイヤーに対して3〜4セットからランダムに選ばれます。5階、10階、15階は固定ボス：デミウルゴス・ステラ、デミウルゴス・ドラカン、デミウルゴス・ヴラダ（位置はランダム）。20階は2セットのボスが交互に登場します。
disclaimer.kr: 매우 어려움 모드에서는 층과 조건이 랜덤으로 변경되며 보스 조합이 달라집니다. 각 플레이어에게 3~4세트 중 랜덤으로 선택됩니다. 5층, 10층, 15층은 고정 보스: 데미우르고스 스텔라, 데미우르고스 드라칸, 데미우르고스 블라다 (위치는 랜덤). 20층은 2세트의 보스가 교대로 등장합니다.
disclaimer.zh: 极难模式的楼层和条件会随机变化，Boss组合也会不同。每位玩家从3-4个方案中随机选择。第5、10、15层为固定Boss：造物主斯特拉、造物主德拉坎、造物主弗拉达（位置随机）。第20层可在3组Boss之间交替。

reason.en: Consistently inflict {D/BT_DOT_LIGHTNING} to deal damage, as she cleanses herself with {B/BT_REMOVE_DEBUFF} at the start of her turn.
You need to {D/BT_STUN} both and keep the stun up in order to remove and prevent Iota from regaining her {B/BT_INVINCIBLE}.
{D/BT_SILENCE} or {D/BT_SEALED_RESURRECTION} {P/Demiurge Astei} in order to disable her revival.
Support Unit to provide chain points, WG damage and healing.
{P/Sterope} is recommended because {P/Demiurge Drakhan}'s counter is triggered by critical hits, she will reduce counter damage by 30% and will reduce all enemies buff duration by 1 turn.
Buff steal is the key here.
Validate restriction plus she has both {B/BT_REMOVE_DEBUFF} and {B/BT_IMMUNE}.
One of the best ways to counter it is to utilize {B/BT_RUN_FIRST_SKILL_ON_TURN_END_DEFENDER} to accumulate chain points faster.
Another way to counter it is by using {P/Ember} with enough {S/EFF} to inflict {D/BT_DOT_BURN}.
{P/Delta} can go in tandem with {P/Cindy}, {P/Dianne} and/or {P/Fran} (EE+10).
Validate restriction and have {B/BT_RUN_FIRST_SKILL_ON_TURN_END_DEFENDER} in her kit.
Will help your team to survive.
Validate restriction and have {B/BT_RUN_FIRST_SKILL_ON_TURN_END_DEFENDER} in her kit.
Validate restriction and have {B/BT_RUN_FIRST_SKILL_ON_TURN_END_DEFENDER} in her kit.
Control and focus the core to prevent {P/Poolside Trickster Regina} to play. Both priority reductions and stun.
Best way is by using {B/BT_ACTION_GAUGE}, {D/BT_ACTION_GAUGE} and hard CC like {D/BT_STUN}, {D/BT_FREEZE} and {D/BT_GOLDEN_CURSE}.
Validate restriction and have either hard CC or good priority manipulation.
Validate restriction and have either {D/BT_ACTION_GAUGE} or {B/BT_ACTION_GAUGE}.
Validate restriction and have either hard CC or good priority manipulation.
